title: Jade's Hit Effects
description: think dark punishment and transcendent combos cosmetic from Monumenta
body:
This mod adds features in order to make combat more exciting and flashy for the player.

## Features:
- **Melee Slash Visual Effect**:
    Every time the player lands a melee hit on a mob, a slash appears.
    This effect is inspired by Monumenta's Skill Cosmetics.
    A sound is also played every time you hit a mob.

- **Special Effect on Kill**:
    When a mob is killed, a flashy animation appears to add to the satisfaction of defeating enemies.
  
  Note:
  - Due to the limitations of the client, this animation will play whenever any mob dies as kill credit is not easily able to be inferred. 
  - Since this mod is client-side, it will only affect the your screen, other players **cannot** see/hear this effect.

- **Configurable**:
  - Colours of particles
  - Spacing (Concentration) of particles
  - Sounds volume
  - Toggle On-Hit and On-Kill particles & sounds
